mapper.insert: INSERT INTO yy_price_history (source_platform, sku_id, product_name, specification, manufacturer, price_current, price_retail, price_assemble, stock_quantity, freight_amount, shop_name, collected_at) VALUES (#{sourcePlatform}, #{skuId}, #{productName}, #{specification}, #{manufacturer}, #{priceCurrent}, #{priceRetail}, #{priceAssemble}, #{stockQuantity}, #{freightAmount}, #{shopName}, #{collectedAt})

INSERT INTO yy_price_history (source_platform, sku_id, product_name, specification, manufacturer, price_current, price_retail, price_assemble, stock_quantity, freight_amount, shop_name, collected_at) VALUES
(#{item.sourcePlatform}, #{item.skuId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.specification}, #{item.manufacturer}, #{item.priceCurrent}, #{item.priceRetail}, #{item.priceAssemble}, #{item.stockQuantity}, #{item.freightAmount}, #{item.shopName}, #{item.collectedAt})
